title: VistA Tools
description: DDR RPC family probe and direct-write posture documentation. Replaces legacy guided terminal / Mode B catalog. All admin writes go through DDR VALIDATOR/FILER or distro overlay RPCs (ZVEUSMG, ZVECLNM, ZVEWRDM).

dataSources.description: Live DDR GETS / VALIDATOR / LISTER probe plus integration notes for DDR FILER.
